event: response.output_text.delta
data: {"type":"response.output_text.delta","sequence_number":0,"delta":"Hello "}

data: {"type":"response.reasoning_summary_text.delta","sequence_number":1,"delta":"Checked the fixture. "}

data: {"type":"response.usage.updated","sequence_number":2,"usage":{"input_tokens":10,"output_tokens":2,"total_tokens":12,"input_tokens_details":{"cached_tokens":3},"output_tokens_details":{"reasoning_tokens":1}}}
